content.content:
1→package transflow
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"encoding/json"
     6→	"fmt"
     7→	"time"
     8→)
     9→
    10→// MaintenanceConfig contains configuration for KB maintenance jobs
    11→type MaintenanceConfig struct {
    12→	// Scheduling configuration
    13→	CompactionInterval     time.Duration `json:"compaction_interval"`      // 24h
    14→	SummaryRebuildInterval time.Duration `json:"summary_rebuild_interval"` // 6h
    15→	SnapshotInterval       time.Duration `json:"snapshot_interval"`        // 1h
    16→
    17→	// Job execution settings
    18→	JobTimeout        time.Duration `json:"job_timeout"`         // 2h
    19→	MaxConcurrentJobs int           `json:"max_concurrent_jobs"` // 3
    20→	JobRetryCount     int           `json:"job_retry_count"`     // 2
    21→
    22→	// Resource limits
    23→	JobMemoryLimit string `json:"job_memory_limit"` // "512M"
    24→	JobCPULimit    string `json:"job_cpu_limit"`    // "500m"
    25→
    26→	// Feature flags
    27→	EnableCompactionJobs   bool `json:"enable_compaction_jobs"`   // true
    28→	EnableSummaryJobs      bool `json:"enable_summary_jobs"`      // true
    29→	EnableSnapshotJobs     bool `json:"enable_snapshot_jobs"`     // true
    30→	EnableMetricsReporting bool `json:"enable_metrics_reporting"` // true
    31→
    32→	// Job submission configuration
    33→	NomadJobTemplate string `json:"nomad_job_template"` // Path to HCL template
    34→	JobNamespace     string `json:"job_namespace"`      // "kb-maintenance"
    35→	JobPriority      int    `json:"job_priority"`       // 25
    36→}
    37→
    38→// DefaultMaintenanceConfig returns reasonable defaults for maintenance jobs
    39→func DefaultMaintenanceConfig() *MaintenanceConfig {
    40→	return &MaintenanceConfig{
    41→		CompactionInterval:     24 * time.Hour,
    42→		SummaryRebuildInterval: 6 * time.Hour,
    43→		SnapshotInterval:       1 * time.Hour,
    44→		JobTimeout:             2 * time.Hour,
    45→		MaxConcurrentJobs:      3,
    46→		JobRetryCount:          2,
    47→		JobMemoryLimit:         "512M",
    48→		JobCPULimit:            "500m",
    49→		EnableCompactionJobs:   true,
    50→		EnableSummaryJobs:      true,
    51→		EnableSnapshotJobs:     true,
    52→		EnableMetricsReporting: true,
    53→		NomadJobTemplate:       "/opt/templates/kb-maintenance.hcl",
    54→		JobNamespace:           "kb-maintenance",
    55→		JobPriority:            25,
    56→	}
    57→}
    58→
    59→// MaintenanceJob represents a KB maintenance job submission
    60→type MaintenanceJob struct {
    61→	ID          string                 `json:"id"`
    62→	Type        MaintenanceJobType     `json:"type"`
    63→	Parameters  map[string]interface{} `json:"parameters"`
    64→	SubmittedAt time.Time              `json:"submitted_at"`
    65→	CompletedAt *time.Time             `json:"completed_at,omitempty"`
    66→	Status      JobStatus              `json:"status"`
    67→	Stats       *DeduplicationStats    `json:"stats,omitempty"`
    68→	Error       string                 `json:"error,omitempty"`
    69→}
    70→
    71→// MaintenanceJobType represents different types of maintenance jobs
    72→type MaintenanceJobType string
    73→
    74→const (
    75→	CompactionJobType         MaintenanceJobType = "compaction"
    76→	SummaryRebuildJobType     MaintenanceJobType = "summary_rebuild"
    77→	SnapshotJobType           MaintenanceJobType = "snapshot"
    78→	PatchDeduplicationJobType MaintenanceJobType = "patch_deduplication"
    79→)
    80→
    81→// JobStatus represents the status of a maintenance job
    82→type JobStatus string
    83→
    84→const (
    85→	JobStatusPending   JobStatus = "pending"
    86→	JobStatusRunning   JobStatus = "running"
    87→	JobStatusCompleted JobStatus = "completed"
    88→	JobStatusFailed    JobStatus = "failed"
    89→	JobStatusCancelled JobStatus = "cancelled"
    90→)
    91→
    92→// MaintenanceScheduler handles scheduling and execution of KB maintenance jobs
    93→type MaintenanceScheduler struct {
    94→	storage         KBStorage
    95→	sigGenerator    EnhancedSignatureGenerator
    96→	lockMgr         KBLockManager
    97→	summaryComputer *SummaryComputer
    98→	// jobSubmitter would be added when orchestration interface is extended
    99→	config *MaintenanceConfig
   100→
   101→	// Internal state
   102→	activeJobs map[string]*MaintenanceJob
   103→	lastRun    map[MaintenanceJobType]time.Time
   104→}
   105→
   106→// NewMaintenanceScheduler creates a new maintenance scheduler
   107→func NewMaintenanceScheduler(
   108→	storage KBStorage,
   109→	sigGenerator EnhancedSignatureGenerator,
   110→	lockMgr KBLockManager,
   111→	summaryComputer *SummaryComputer,
   112→	config *MaintenanceConfig,
   113→) *MaintenanceScheduler {
   114→	if config == nil {
   115→		config = DefaultMaintenanceConfig()
   116→	}
   117→
   118→	return &MaintenanceScheduler{
   119→		storage:         storage,
   120→		sigGenerator:    sigGenerator,
   121→		lockMgr:         lockMgr,
   122→		summaryComputer: summaryComputer,
   123→		config:          config,
   124→		activeJobs:      make(map[string]*MaintenanceJob),
   125→		lastRun:         make(map[MaintenanceJobType]time.Time),
   126→	}
   127→}
   128→
   129→// StartScheduler begins the maintenance job scheduling loop
   130→func (ms *MaintenanceScheduler) StartScheduler(ctx context.Context) error {
   131→	ticker := time.NewTicker(5 * time.Minute) // Check every 5 minutes
   132→	defer ticker.Stop()
   133→
   134→	for {
   135→		select {
   136→		case <-ctx.Done():
   137→			return ctx.Err()
   138→		case <-ticker.C:
   139→			if err := ms.scheduleJobs(ctx); err != nil {
   140→				// Log error but continue scheduling
   141→				fmt.Printf("Error scheduling maintenance jobs: %v\n", err)
   142→			}
   143→		}
   144→	}
   145→}
   146→
   147→// scheduleJobs checks if any maintenance jobs need to be scheduled
   148→func (ms *MaintenanceScheduler) scheduleJobs(ctx context.Context) error {
   149→	now := time.Now()
   150→
   151→	// Check compaction jobs
   152→	if ms.config.EnableCompactionJobs {
   153→		lastCompaction := ms.lastRun[CompactionJobType]
   154→		if now.Sub(lastCompaction) >= ms.config.CompactionInterval {
   155→			if err := ms.scheduleCompactionJob(ctx); err != nil {
   156→				return fmt.Errorf("failed to schedule compaction job: %w", err)
   157→			}
   158→			ms.lastRun[CompactionJobType] = now
   159→		}
   160→	}
   161→
   162→	// Check summary rebuild jobs
   163→	if ms.config.EnableSummaryJobs {
   164→		lastSummary := ms.lastRun[SummaryRebuildJobType]
   165→		if now.Sub(lastSummary) >= ms.config.SummaryRebuildInterval {
   166→			if err := ms.scheduleSummaryRebuildJob(ctx); err != nil {
   167→				return fmt.Errorf("failed to schedule summary rebuild job: %w", err)
   168→			}
   169→			ms.lastRun[SummaryRebuildJobType] = now
   170→		}
   171→	}
   172→
   173→	// Check snapshot jobs
   174→	if ms.config.EnableSnapshotJobs {
   175→		lastSnapshot := ms.lastRun[SnapshotJobType]
   176→		if now.Sub(lastSnapshot) >= ms.config.SnapshotInterval {
   177→			if err := ms.scheduleSnapshotJob(ctx); err != nil {
   178→				return fmt.Errorf("failed to schedule snapshot job: %w", err)
   179→			}
   180→			ms.lastRun[SnapshotJobType] = now
   181→		}
   182→	}
   183→
   184→	return nil
   185→}
   186→
   187→// scheduleCompactionJob submits a new compaction job
   188→func (ms *MaintenanceScheduler) scheduleCompactionJob(ctx context.Context) error {
   189→	if len(ms.activeJobs) >= ms.config.MaxConcurrentJobs {
   190→		return fmt.Errorf("max concurrent jobs reached (%d)", ms.config.MaxConcurrentJobs)
   191→	}
   192→
   193→	jobID := fmt.Sprintf("compaction-%d", time.Now().Unix())
   194→	job := &MaintenanceJob{
   195→		ID:   jobID,
   196→		Type: CompactionJobType,
   197→		Parameters: map[string]interface{}{
   198→			"dry_run":         false,
   199→			"full_compaction": true,
   200→		},
   201→		SubmittedAt: time.Now(),
   202→		Status:      JobStatusPending,
   203→	}
   204→
   205→	// Submit job via Nomad
   206→	err := ms.submitNomadJob(ctx, job)
   207→	if err != nil {
   208→		return fmt.Errorf("failed to submit compaction job: %w", err)
   209→	}
   210→
   211→	ms.activeJobs[jobID] = job
   212→	return nil
   213→}
   214→
   215→// scheduleSummaryRebuildJob submits a summary rebuild job
   216→func (ms *MaintenanceScheduler) scheduleSummaryRebuildJob(ctx context.Context) error {
   217→	if len(ms.activeJobs) >= ms.config.MaxConcurrentJobs {
   218→		return fmt.Errorf("max concurrent jobs reached (%d)", ms.config.MaxConcurrentJobs)
   219→	}
   220→
   221→	jobID := fmt.Sprintf("summary-rebuild-%d", time.Now().Unix())
   222→	job := &MaintenanceJob{
   223→		ID:   jobID,
   224→		Type: SummaryRebuildJobType,
   225→		Parameters: map[string]interface{}{
   226→			"rebuild_all":  true,
   227→			"force_update": false,
   228→		},
   229→		SubmittedAt: time.Now(),
   230→		Status:      JobStatusPending,
   231→	}
   232→
   233→	err := ms.submitNomadJob(ctx, job)
   234→	if err != nil {
   235→		return fmt.Errorf("failed to submit summary rebuild job: %w", err)
   236→	}
   237→
   238→	ms.activeJobs[jobID] = job
   239→	return nil
   240→}
   241→
   242→// scheduleSnapshotJob submits a snapshot generation job
   243→func (ms *MaintenanceScheduler) scheduleSnapshotJob(ctx context.Context) error {
   244→	if len(ms.activeJobs) >= ms.config.MaxConcurrentJobs {
   245→		return fmt.Errorf("max concurrent jobs reached (%d)", ms.config.MaxConcurrentJobs)
   246→	}
   247→
   248→	jobID := fmt.Sprintf("snapshot-%d", time.Now().Unix())
   249→	job := &MaintenanceJob{
   250→		ID:   jobID,
   251→		Type: SnapshotJobType,
   252→		Parameters: map[string]interface{}{
   253→			"include_metrics": ms.config.EnableMetricsReporting,
   254→		},
   255→		SubmittedAt: time.Now(),
   256→		Status:      JobStatusPending,
   257→	}
   258→
   259→	err := ms.submitNomadJob(ctx, job)
   260→	if err != nil {
   261→		return fmt.Errorf("failed to submit snapshot job: %w", err)
   262→	}
   263→
   264→	ms.activeJobs[jobID] = job
   265→	return nil
   266→}
   267→
   268→// submitNomadJob submits a maintenance job to Nomad
   269→func (ms *MaintenanceScheduler) submitNomadJob(ctx context.Context, job *MaintenanceJob) error {
   270→	// Prepare job parameters
   271→	jobVars := map[string]interface{}{
   272→		"job_id":       job.ID,
   273→		"job_type":     string(job.Type),
   274→		"parameters":   job.Parameters,
   275→		"memory_limit": ms.config.JobMemoryLimit,
   276→		"cpu_limit":    ms.config.JobCPULimit,
   277→		"timeout":      ms.config.JobTimeout.String(),
   278→		"namespace":    ms.config.JobNamespace,
   279→		"priority":     ms.config.JobPriority,
   280→		"retry_count":  ms.config.JobRetryCount,
   281→	}
   282→
   283→	// Convert to JSON for job template
   284→	jobVarsJSON, err := json.Marshal(jobVars)
   285→	if err != nil {
   286→		return fmt.Errorf("failed to marshal job variables: %w", err)
   287→	}
   288→
   289→	// Submit job using orchestration interface
   290→	// For now, this is a simplified interface - the actual implementation
   291→	// would need to integrate with the existing job submission infrastructure
   292→	return ms.submitJobViaOrchestration(ctx, string(jobVarsJSON))
   293→}
   294→
   295→// submitJobViaOrchestration submits job through the orchestration layer
   296→func (ms *MaintenanceScheduler) submitJobViaOrchestration(ctx context.Context, jobConfig string) error {
   297→	// This would integrate with the existing orchestration.Submit functions
   298→	// For now, we'll implement a placeholder that demonstrates the pattern
   299→
   300→	// In a real implementation, this would:
   301→	// 1. Load the HCL job template from ms.config.NomadJobTemplate
   302→	// 2. Substitute variables using orchestration.RenderTemplate
   303→	// 3. Submit using orchestration.SubmitAndWaitTerminal
   304→
   305→	return nil // Placeholder implementation
   306→}
   307→
   308→// MonitorJobs checks the status of active maintenance jobs
   309→func (ms *MaintenanceScheduler) MonitorJobs(ctx context.Context) error {
   310→	for jobID, job := range ms.activeJobs {
   311→		// Check job status from Nomad
   312→		status, err := ms.getJobStatus(ctx, jobID)
   313→		if err != nil {
   314→			continue // Skip jobs we can't check
   315→		}
   316→
   317→		// Update job status
   318→		job.Status = status
   319→
   320→		// Handle completed/failed jobs
   321→		if status == JobStatusCompleted || status == JobStatusFailed {
   322→			now := time.Now()
   323→			job.CompletedAt = &now
   324→
   325→			// Get job results if completed successfully
   326→			if status == JobStatusCompleted {
   327→				stats, err := ms.getJobResults(ctx, jobID)
   328→				if err == nil {
   329→					job.Stats = stats
   330→				}
   331→			}
   332→
   333→			// Remove from active jobs
   334→			delete(ms.activeJobs, jobID)
   335→
   336→			// Store job record for history/metrics
   337→			if ms.config.EnableMetricsReporting {
   338→				ms.recordJobMetrics(job)
   339→			}
   340→		}
   341→	}
   342→
   343→	return nil
   344→}
   345→
   346→// getJobStatus queries Nomad for job status
   347→func (ms *MaintenanceScheduler) getJobStatus(ctx context.Context, jobID string) (JobStatus, error) {
   348→	// This would query the Nomad API to get the actual job status
   349→	// For now, return a placeholder
   350→	return JobStatusRunning, nil
   351→}
   352→
   353→// getJobResults retrieves results from a completed job
   354→func (ms *MaintenanceScheduler) getJobResults(ctx context.Context, jobID string) (*DeduplicationStats, error) {
   355→	// This would retrieve job artifacts/results from Nomad
   356→	// The job would write results to a known location that we can read
   357→	return &DeduplicationStats{}, nil
   358→}
   359→
   360→// recordJobMetrics records job completion metrics
   361→func (ms *MaintenanceScheduler) recordJobMetrics(job *MaintenanceJob) {
   362→	// This would record metrics to whatever monitoring system is in use
   363→	// For now, just log the completion
   364→	fmt.Printf("Maintenance job %s (%s) completed with status %s\n",
   365→		job.ID, job.Type, job.Status)
   366→}
   367→
   368→// GetActiveJobs returns currently active maintenance jobs
   369→func (ms *MaintenanceScheduler) GetActiveJobs() []*MaintenanceJob {
   370→	jobs := make([]*MaintenanceJob, 0, len(ms.activeJobs))
   371→	for _, job := range ms.activeJobs {
   372→		jobs = append(jobs, job)
   373→	}
   374→	return jobs
   375→}
   376→
   377→// CancelJob cancels an active maintenance job
   378→func (ms *MaintenanceScheduler) CancelJob(ctx context.Context, jobID string) error {
   379→	job, exists := ms.activeJobs[jobID]
   380→	if !exists {
   381→		return fmt.Errorf("job %s not found", jobID)
   382→	}
   383→
   384→	// Cancel job in Nomad
   385→	err := ms.cancelNomadJob(ctx, jobID)
   386→	if err != nil {
   387→		return fmt.Errorf("failed to cancel job: %w", err)
   388→	}
   389→
   390→	// Update local state
   391→	job.Status = JobStatusCancelled
   392→	now := time.Now()
   393→	job.CompletedAt = &now
   394→
   395→	delete(ms.activeJobs, jobID)
   396→	return nil
   397→}
   398→
   399→// cancelNomadJob cancels a job in Nomad
   400→func (ms *MaintenanceScheduler) cancelNomadJob(ctx context.Context, jobID string) error {
   401→	// This would use the Nomad API to stop/purge the job
   402→	// For now, return success
   403→	return nil
   404→}
   405→
   406→// TriggerManualCompaction manually triggers a compaction job
   407→func (ms *MaintenanceScheduler) TriggerManualCompaction(ctx context.Context, params map[string]interface{}) (*MaintenanceJob, error) {
   408→	jobID := fmt.Sprintf("manual-compaction-%d", time.Now().Unix())
   409→	job := &MaintenanceJob{
   410→		ID:          jobID,
   411→		Type:        CompactionJobType,
   412→		Parameters:  params,
   413→		SubmittedAt: time.Now(),
   414→		Status:      JobStatusPending,
   415→	}
   416→
   417→	err := ms.submitNomadJob(ctx, job)
   418→	if err != nil {
   419→		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to submit manual compaction: %w", err)
   420→	}
   421→
   422→	ms.activeJobs[jobID] = job
   423→	return job, nil
   424→}
   425→
   426→// GetJobHistory returns historical job information
   427→func (ms *MaintenanceScheduler) GetJobHistory(ctx context.Context, jobType MaintenanceJobType, limit int) ([]*MaintenanceJob, error) {
   428→	// This would query a persistent store (likely the KB itself) for job history
   429→	// For now, return empty list
   430→	return []*MaintenanceJob{}, nil
   431→}
   432→
   433→// MaintenanceStatus provides overall maintenance system status
   434→type MaintenanceStatus struct {
   435→	ActiveJobs     int                              `json:"active_jobs"`
   436→	LastRun        map[MaintenanceJobType]time.Time `json:"last_run"`
   437→	NextScheduled  map[MaintenanceJobType]time.Time `json:"next_scheduled"`
   438→	TotalJobsToday map[MaintenanceJobType]int       `json:"total_jobs_today"`
   439→	SystemHealth   string                           `json:"system_health"`
   440→	ConfigVersion  string                           `json:"config_version"`
   441→}
   442→
   443→// GetMaintenanceStatus returns current maintenance system status
   444→func (ms *MaintenanceScheduler) GetMaintenanceStatus(ctx context.Context) (*MaintenanceStatus, error) {
   445→	status := &MaintenanceStatus{
   446→		ActiveJobs:     len(ms.activeJobs),
   447→		LastRun:        ms.lastRun,
   448→		NextScheduled:  make(map[MaintenanceJobType]time.Time),
   449→		TotalJobsToday: make(map[MaintenanceJobType]int),
   450→		SystemHealth:   "healthy",
   451→		ConfigVersion:  "1.0.0",
   452→	}
   453→
   454→	// Calculate next scheduled times
   455→	if ms.config.EnableCompactionJobs {
   456→		lastCompaction := ms.lastRun[CompactionJobType]
   457→		status.NextScheduled[CompactionJobType] = lastCompaction.Add(ms.config.CompactionInterval)
   458→	}
   459→
   460→	if ms.config.EnableSummaryJobs {
   461→		lastSummary := ms.lastRun[SummaryRebuildJobType]
   462→		status.NextScheduled[SummaryRebuildJobType] = lastSummary.Add(ms.config.SummaryRebuildInterval)
   463→	}
   464→
   465→	if ms.config.EnableSnapshotJobs {
   466→		lastSnapshot := ms.lastRun[SnapshotJobType]
   467→		status.NextScheduled[SnapshotJobType] = lastSnapshot.Add(ms.config.SnapshotInterval)
   468→	}
   469→
   470→	// System health would be determined by recent job success rates, storage health, etc.
   471→	if len(ms.activeJobs) > ms.config.MaxConcurrentJobs {
   472→		status.SystemHealth = "degraded"
   473→	}
   474→
   475→	return status, nil
   476→}
